category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a GObject library for handling and rendering XPS documents; official GNOME wiki page says the same: https://wiki.gnome.org/Projects/libgxps
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libgxps; official GNOME wiki and GitLab project use libgxps: https://wiki.gnome.org/Projects/libgxps
docs_sources: Official GNOME wiki project page includes documentation and source links for libgxps: https://wiki.gnome.org/Projects/libgxps
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNOME wiki Source code section lists Git at https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libgxps/
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies XPS handling/rendering; official GNOME wiki lists XPS/OpenXPS, GObject, Cairo, libarchive, and rendering dependencies: https://wiki.gnome.org/Projects/libgxps
